TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Brunei ta' misuw hya' ga Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1967 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßaji ńßas~…ēs~…ēanal ő≤olkiańß mu Ēizza**in wa**aulańß, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤runei ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßaji ńßas~…ēs~…ēanal ő≤olkiańß mu Ēizza**in wa**aulańß, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Brunei ta' misuw hya' ga Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1967 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
